ÓżåÓż¬ÓżĢÓźć ÓżĢÓźŹÓż░ÓźćÓżĪÓż┐Óż¤ ÓżĢÓżŠÓż░ÓźŹÓżĪ ÓżĢÓźć Óż¬ÓźĆÓżøÓźć ÓżÜÓźüÓżéÓż¼ÓżĢÓźĆÓż» Óż¬Óż¤ÓźŹÓż¤ÓźĆ Óż«ÓźćÓżé ÓżŁÓźüÓżŚÓżżÓżŠÓż© ÓżĢÓż░Óż©Óźć ÓżĢÓźć Óż▓Óż┐ÓżÅ ÓżĖÓżŁÓźĆ ÓżåÓżĄÓżČÓźŹÓż»ÓżĢ Óż£ÓżŠÓż©ÓżĢÓżŠÓż░ÓźĆ Óż╣ÓźŗÓżżÓźĆ Óż╣Óźł, Óż£Óż┐ÓżĖÓż«ÓźćÓżé ÓżåÓż¬ÓżĢÓżŠ Óż©ÓżŠÓż«, ÓżĢÓżŠÓż░ÓźŹÓżĪ Óż©ÓżéÓż¼Óż░ ÓżöÓż░ ÓżĖÓż«ÓżŠÓż¬ÓźŹÓżżÓż┐ ÓżżÓż┐ÓżźÓż┐ ÓżČÓżŠÓż«Óż┐Óż▓ Óż╣ÓźłÓźż Óż£Óż¼ ÓżåÓż¬ ÓżÅÓż¤ÓźĆÓżÅÓż« Óż»ÓżŠ ÓżŁÓźüÓżŚÓżżÓżŠÓż© Óż¤Óż░ÓźŹÓż«Óż┐Óż©Óż▓ Óż¬Óż░ ÓżģÓż¬Óż©Óźć ÓżĢÓżŠÓż░ÓźŹÓżĪ ÓżĢÓżŠ ÓżēÓż¬Óż»ÓźŗÓżŚ ÓżĢÓż░ÓżżÓźć Óż╣ÓźłÓżé ÓżżÓźŗ ÓżģÓż¬Óż░ÓżŠÓż¦ÓźĆ ÓżćÓżĖ Óż£ÓżŠÓż©ÓżĢÓżŠÓż░ÓźĆ ÓżĢÓźŗ ÓżÜÓźüÓż░ÓżŠÓż©Óźć ÓżĢÓźć Óż▓Óż┐ÓżÅ ÓżĖÓźŹÓżĢÓż┐Óż«Óż░ÓźŹÓżĖ ÓżĢÓżŠ ÓżēÓż¬Óż»ÓźŗÓżŚ ÓżĢÓż░ ÓżĖÓżĢÓżżÓźć Óż╣ÓźłÓżéÓźż

item.title: Overcoming Challenges and Embracing Opportunities of DevSecOps Implementation
item.description: This article explores the challenges and opportunities of DevSecOps in organizations, including better collaboration, improved scalability, integration with government regulations, and more.

item.title: Azure Security Center: Comprehensive Guide to Safeguard Your Cloud Environment
item.description: Learn how to secure your cloud environment using Azure Security Center, with best practices and real-world examples.
item.content:encoded:
Read the full article at https://simeononsecurity.ch/ 
# Create a Network Security Group
az network nsg create --name MyNSG --resource-group MyResourceGroup

# Add rules to allow or deny traffic
az network nsg rule create --name MyNSGRule --nsg-name MyNSG --priority 100 --resource-group MyResourceGroup --access Allow --protocol Tcp --direction Inbound --source-address-prefixes '*' --source-port-ranges '*' --destination-address-prefixes '*' --destination-port-ranges '80'

# Create a WAF policy
az network application-gateway waf-policy create --name MyWafPolicy --resource-group MyResourceGroup --location EastUS

# Create a virtual network and subnet
az network vnet create --name MyVNet --resource-group MyResourceGroup --location EastUS --address-prefix 10.0.0.0/16
az network vnet subnet create --name MySubnet --resource-group MyResourceGroup --vnet-name MyVNet --address-prefix 10.0.0.0/24

# Create a public IP address
az network public-ip create --name MyPublicIP --resource-group MyResourceGroup --location EastUS --sku Standard

# Create an Application Gateway with WAF enabled
az network application-gateway create --name MyAppGateway --resource-group MyResourceGroup --location EastUS --vnet-name MyVNet --subnet MySubnet --public-ip-address MyPublicIP --http-settings-cookie-based-affinity Enabled --sku WAF_v2 --waf-policy MyWafPolicy

# Connect to Azure AD
Connect-AzureAD

# Enable MFA for a specific user
$UserPrincipalName = "johndoe@example.com"
$StsUserObjectID = (Get-AzureADUser -Filter "UserPrincipalName eq '$UserPrincipalName'").ObjectId
$StrongAuthRequirements = @(@{Read More at https://simeononsecurity.ch/
